content.desc: Forging the frontier of quantum algorithms, NISQ hardware, and machine learning. Three arXiv co-authorships. Outperformed QAOA on Weighted Max-Cut.
content.footer: © MMXXVI · Danush Vikraman · PES University · Bengaluru
content.ex1-b1: Fabricated EML layers for Indian QLED panels (CVD, spin-coating), characterising quantum-material device properties across 5+ thin-film samples via DC Keithley, Impedance Analyser, Cyclic Voltammetry, and UV Spectroscopy.
content.ex1-b2: Contributed numerical analysis to neuromorphic computing and quantum-classical hybrid learning model research. Presented findings at Quanad Lab Open Day.
content.ex2-c: Edunet Foundation · AICTE & IBM SkillsBuild · Remote
content.ex2-b1: Built and deployed an Employee Salary Prediction app using Random Forest Classifier (89.4% accuracy), engineering an end-to-end ML pipeline from data cleaning through production deployment on Streamlit.
